title: How the Work God Sees Builds the Man Everyone Else Trusts
caption:
Every guy wants to be trusted. Not many want to do the part of the work that earns it.

Trust isn't built in the moments people are watching. It's built in the ones they're not: the early alarm, the promise you kept when breaking it would've been easier, the rep nobody was there to see.

Whatever you do, work at it with all your heart, as working for the Lord, not for people. (Colossians 3:23)

Here's what that actually looks like this week.

#faith #christianmen #discipline #godlymen #manofgod #scripture #hardwork
